productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Beige Trouser
description: CompositionBeige trousers made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back, loops on the waistband to hold the trousers in place with a button and zip closureFitRegularWash careMachine wash gentle with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsGet in touch with your feminine side with these fabulous trousers from united colors of benetton. The slim cuts and above the ankle length makes this a perfect buy for your casual outings while the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort. Team this with a comfort tee and flip flops or sandals for those perfect weekends.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and waist 28”
